nodes.x: These are the sons of Israel; Reuben, Simeon, Levi, and Judah, Issachar, and Zebulun,
Reuben, Simeon, Levi, and Judah,
The sons of Leah; Reuben, Jacob’s firstborn, and Simeon, and Levi, and Judah, and Issachar, and Zebulun:

and Jachin, and Zohar, and Shaul, the son of the Zephathite 1 woman--seven. 14. Levi and his sons; and these are the names of his sons: Gershon, and Kohath, and Merari--four. 15. Judah and his sons; and these are the names of his sons: Shela, and Perez, and Zerah--four. 16. Issachar and his sons; and these are the names of his sons: Tola, and Phûa, 2 and Jâsûb, 3 and Shimron--five. 17. Zebulon…
¶ Furthermore over the tribes of Israel: the ruler of the Reubenites was Eliezer the son of Zichri: of the Simeonites, Shephatiah the son of Maachah:
The sons, I say, of Reuben the firstborn of Israel were, Hanoch, and Pallu, Hezron, and Carmi.
Dan, Joseph, and Benjamin, Naphtali, Gad, and Asher.
Dan, and Naphtali, Gad, and Asher.
¶ And the sons of Gad; Ziphion, and Haggi, Shuni, and Ezbon, Eri, and Arodi, and Areli.
The sons of Japheth; Gomer, and Magog, and Madai, and Javan, and Tubal, and Meshech, and Tiras.
¶ And the sons of Benjamin were Belah, and Becher, and Ashbel, Gera, and Naaman, Ehi, and Rosh, Muppim, and Huppim, and Ard.
¶ The sons of Japheth; Gomer, and Magog, and Madai, and Javan, and Tubal, and Meshech, and Tiras.
¶ The sons of Judah; Er, and Onan, and Shelah: which three were born unto him of the daughter of Shua the Canaanitess. And Er, the firstborn of Judah, was evil in the sight of the Lord; and he slew…
¶ And the sons of Judah; Er, and Onan, and Shelah, and Pharez, and Zerah: but Er and Onan died in the land of Canaan. And the sons of Pharez were Hezron and Hamul.
¶ The sons of Judah were Er and Onan: and Er and Onan died in the land of Canaan.
And Er, Judah’s firstborn, was wicked in the sight of the Lord; and the Lord slew him.
The sons of Judah; Pharez, Hezron, and Carmi, and Hur, and Shobal.

And at Jerusalem dwelt certain of the children of Judah, and of the children of Benjamin. Of the children of Judah; Athaiah the son of Uzziah, the son of Zechariah, the son of Amariah, the son of Shephatiah, the son of Mahalaleel, of the children of Perez;
And Tamar his daughter in law bare him Pharez and Zerah. All the sons of Judah were five.
And all Judah stood before the Lord, with their little ones, their wives, and their children.
And Judah took a wife for Er his firstborn, whose name was Tamar.
And of the sons of Elam; Jeshaiah the son of Athaliah, and with him seventy males.

And they came up into Judah, and brake into it, and carried away all the substance that was found in the king’s house, and his sons also, and his wives; so that there was never a son left him, save Jehoahaz, the youngest of his sons.
The sons of Pharez; Hezron, and Hamul.
And the sons of Pharez were; of Hezron, the family of the Hezronites: of Hamul, the family of the Hamulites.
The sons also of Hezron, that were born unto him; Jerahmeel, and Ram, and Chelubai.
¶ And the sons of Jerahmeel the firstborn of Hezron were, Ram the firstborn, and Bunah, and Oren, and Ozem, and Ahijah.
And the sons of Zerah; Zimri, and Ethan, and Heman, and Calcol, and Dara: five of them in all.
And of the sons of Elam; Mattaniah, Zechariah, and Jehiel, and Abdi, and Jeremoth, and Eliah.
The sons of Zophah; Suah, and Harnepher, and Shual, and Beri, and Imrah,
The sons also of Jediael; Bilhan: and the sons of Bilhan; Jeush, and Benjamin, and Ehud, and Chenaanah, and Zethan, and Tharshish, and Ahishahar.
And the sons of Ethan; Azariah.
The sons of Eliphaz; Teman, and Omar, Zephi, and Gatam, Kenaz, and Timna, and Amalek.
And the sons of Carmi; Achar, the troubler of Israel, who transgressed in the thing accursed.

But the children of Israel committed a trespass in the accursed thing: for Achan, the son of Carmi, the son of Zabdi, the son of Zerah, of the tribe of Judah, took of the accursed thing: and the anger of the Lord was kindled against the children of Israel.
And he brought his household man by man; and Achan, the son of Carmi, the son of Zabdi, the son of Zerah, of the tribe of Judah, was taken.
And Abraham begat Isaac. The sons of Isaac; Esau and Israel.
Did not Achan the son of Zerah commit a trespass in the accursed thing, and wrath fell on all the congregation of Israel? and that man perished not alone in his iniquity.

And Joshua, and all Israel with him, took Achan the son of Zerah, and the silver, and the garment, and the wedge of gold, and his sons, and his daughters, and his oxen, and his asses, and his sheep, and his tent, and all that he had: and they brought them unto the valley of Achor.
And the sons of Ethan; Azariah.
And the sons of Zerah; Zimri, and Ethan, and Heman, and Calcol, and Dara: five of them in all.
And Azariah, Ezra, and Meshullam,
And Michael, and Ispah, and Joha, the sons of Beriah;
And their brethren the sons of Merari stood on the left hand: Ethan the son of Kishi, the son of Abdi, the son of Malluch,
And the sons of Kenaz; Othniel, and Seraiah: and the sons of Othniel; Hathath.
The sons also of Hezron, that were born unto him; Jerahmeel, and Ram, and Chelubai.
The sons of Pharez; Hezron, and Hamul.
And the sons of Ram the firstborn of Jerahmeel were, Maaz, and Jamin, and Eker.
And the sons of Kohath by their families; Amram, and Izehar, Hebron, and Uzziel.
And Ram begat Amminadab; and Amminadab begat Nahshon, prince of the children of Judah;
Of Judah; Nahshon the son of Amminadab.
And Shallum begat Jekamiah, and Jekamiah begat Elishama.
And Shallum begat Hilkiah, and Hilkiah begat Azariah,
And the prince of the tribe of the children of Naphtali, Pedahel the son of Ammihud.
And Nahshon begat Salma, and Salma begat Boaz,
And Arphaxad begat Salah; and Salah begat Eber.
And Ahaz begat Jarah; and Jarah begat Alemeth, and Azmaveth, and Zimri; and Zimri begat Moza;
And Ahitub begat Zadok, and Zadok begat Ahimaaz,
And Salmon begat Boaz, and Boaz begat Obed,
And Obed begat Jehu, and Jehu begat Azariah,
And Boaz begat Obed, and Obed begat Jesse,
And Obed begat Jesse, and Jesse begat David.
And Nahshon begat Salma, and Salma begat Boaz,
And Salmon begat Booz of Rachab; and Booz begat Obed of Ruth; and Obed begat Jesse;
¶ And Jesse begat his firstborn Eliab, and Abinadab the second, and Shimma the third,

And the three eldest sons of Jesse went and followed Saul to the battle: and the names of his three sons that went to the battle were Eliab the firstborn, and next unto him Abinadab, and the third Shammah.
Eliab his son, Jeroham his son, Elkanah his son.
And the sons of Eshek his brother were, Ulam his firstborn, Jehush the second, and Eliphelet the third.
¶ The sons of Esau; Eliphaz, Reuel, and Jeush, and Jaalam, and Korah.
And the sons of Pallu; Eliab.
Nethaneel the fourth, Raddai the fifth,
Of Issachar; Nethaneel the son of Zuar.
Nohah the fourth, and Rapha the fifth.
And for a sacrifice of peace offerings, two oxen, five rams, five he goats, five lambs of the first year: this was the offering of Nethaneel the son of Zuar.
Of Hilkiah, Hashabiah; of Jedaiah, Nethaneel.
The men of Netophah, fifty and six.
Ozem the sixth, David the seventh:
And the sixth, Ithream, by Eglah David’s wife. These were born to David in Hebron.
Elam the fifth, Jehohanan the sixth, Elioenai the seventh.
¶ And when the Philistines heard that David was anointed king over all Israel, all the Philistines went up to seek David. And David heard of it, and went out against them.

CHAPTER 5. How David Brought Under The Philistines, And The Moabites,
And The Kings Of Sophene And Of Damascus, And Of The Syrians As Also The
Idumeans, In War; And How He Made A League With The King Of Hamath; And
Was Mindful Of The Friendship That Jonathan, The Son Of Saul, Had Borne
Him.
Whose sisters were Zeruiah, and Abigail. And the sons of Zeruiah; Abishai, and Joab, and Asahel, three.
¶ And there were three sons of Zeruiah there, Joab, and Abishai, and Asahel: and Asahel was as light of foot as a wild roe.
And Abishai, the brother of Joab, the son of Zeruiah, was chief among three. And he lifted up his spear against three hundred, and slew them, and had the name among three.
And the sons of Pedaiah were, Zerubbabel, and Shimei: and the sons of Zerubbabel; Meshullam, and Hananiah, and Shelomith their sister:
And Jaresiah, and Eliah, and Zichri, the sons of Jeroham.
And Abigail bare Amasa: and the father of Amasa was Jether the Ishmeelite.

¶ And Absalom made Amasa captain of the host instead of Joab: which Amasa was a man’s son, whose name was Ithra an Israelite, that went in to Abigail the daughter of Nahash, sister to Zeruiah Joab’s mother.
And Aaron took him Elisheba, daughter of Amminadab, sister of Naashon, to wife; and she bare him Nadab, and Abihu, Eleazar, and Ithamar.
And Amnigaddah was the son of Aaron.
Whose sisters were Zeruiah, and Abigail. And the sons of Zeruiah; Abishai, and Joab, and Asahel, three.
And the sons of Ezra were, Jether, and Mered, and Epher, and Jalon: and she bare Miriam, and Shammai, and Ishbah the father of Eshtemoa.
¶ And Caleb the son of Hezron begat children of Azubah his wife, and of Jerioth: her sons are these; Jesher, and Shobab, and Ardon.
And the sons of Caleb the son of Jephunneh; Iru, Elah, and Naam: and the sons of Elah, even Kenaz.
And he had brethren the sons of Jehoshaphat, Azariah, and Jehiel, and Zechariah, and Azariah, and Michael, and Shephatiah: all these were the sons of Jehoshaphat king of Israel.
And these are the sons of Reuel; Nahath, and Zerah, Shammah, and Mizzah: these were the sons of Bashemath Esau’s wife.
¶ Now the sons of Caleb the brother of Jerahmeel were, Mesha his firstborn, which was the father of Ziph; and the sons of Mareshah the father of Hebron.
And when Azubah was dead, Caleb took unto him Ephrath, which bare him Hur.
And after that Hezron was dead in Caleb-ephratah, then Abiah Hezron’s wife bare him Ashur the father of Tekoa.
And Joshua blessed him, and gave unto Caleb the son of Jephunneh Hebron for an inheritance.
And Othniel the son of Kenaz, the brother of Caleb, took it: and he gave him Achsah his daughter to wife.
And they gave Hebron unto Caleb, as Moses said: and he expelled thence the three sons of Anak.
After him repaired Benjamin and Hashub over against their house. After him repaired Azariah the son of Maaseiah the son of Ananiah by his house.
And Hur begat Uri, and Uri begat Bezaleel.
And Zabad begat Ephlal, and Ephlal begat Obed,
And Arphaxad begat Shelah, and Shelah begat Eber.
And Eleasah begat Sisamai, and Sisamai begat Shallum,
¶ And afterward Hezron went in to the daughter of Machir the father of Gilead, whom he married when he was threescore years old; and she bare him Segub.
And the children of Machir the son of Manasseh went to Gilead, and took it, and dispossessed the Amorite which was in it.

¶ But Zelophehad, the son of Hepher, the son of Gilead, the son of Machir, the son of Manasseh, had no sons, but daughters: and these are the names of his daughters, Mahlah, and Noah, Hoglah, Milcah, and Tirzah.

Then came the daughters of Zelophehad, the son of Hepher, the son of Gilead, the son of Machir, the son of Manasseh, of the families of Manasseh the son of Joseph: and these are the names of his daughters; Mahlah, Noah, and Hoglah, and Milcah, and Tirzah.
¶ The sons of Manasseh; Ashriel, whom she bare: (but his concubine the Aramitess bare Machir the father of Gilead:
And Sheshan gave his daughter to Jarha his servant to wife; and she bare him Attai.
And Segub begat Jair, who had three and twenty cities in the land of Gilead.
And he took Geshur, and Aram, with the towns of Jair, from them, with Kenath, and the towns thereof, even threescore cities. All these belonged to the sons of Machir the father of Gilead.
And he had thirty sons that rode on thirty ass colts, and they had thirty cities, which are called Havoth-jair unto this day, which are in the land of Gilead.
And Jair the son of Manasseh went and took the small towns thereof, and called them Havoth-jair.

The son of Geber, in Ramoth-gilead; to him pertained the towns of Jair the son of Manasseh, which are in Gilead; to him also pertained the region of Argob, which is in Bashan, threescore great cities with walls and brasen bars:
And he took Geshur, and Aram, with the towns of Jair, from them, with Kenath, and the towns thereof, even threescore cities. All these belonged to the sons of Machir the father of Gilead.
And Segub begat Jair, who had three and twenty cities in the land of Gilead.
And the sons of Ulam; Bedan. These were the sons of Gilead, the son of Machir, the son of Manasseh.

There was also a lot for the tribe of Manasseh; for he was the firstborn of Joseph; to wit, for Machir the firstborn of Manasseh, the father of Gilead: because he was a man of war, therefore he had Gilead and Bashan.

And half Gilead, and Ashtaroth, and Edrei, cities of the kingdom of Og in Bashan, were pertaining unto the children of Machir the son of Manasseh, even to the one half of the children of Machir by their families.
And after that Hezron was dead in Caleb-ephratah, then Abiah Hezron’s wife bare him Ashur the father of Tekoa.
And Ahaz slept with his fathers, and was buried with his fathers in the city of David: and Hezekiah his son reigned in his stead.
And when Azubah was dead, Caleb took unto him Ephrath, which bare him Hur.
¶ And Ashur the father of Tekoa had two wives, Helah and Naarah.
¶ And the sons of Jerahmeel the firstborn of Hezron were, Ram the firstborn, and Bunah, and Oren, and Ozem, and Ahijah.
Jerahmeel had also another wife, whose name was Atarah; she was the mother of Onam.
¶ And these were the sons of Aholibamah, the daughter of Anah the daughter of Zibeon, Esau’s wife: and she bare to Esau Jeush, and Jaalam, and Korah.

It behoves us here, however, to remark, that the mother stayed with her son in cases where both were divorced together from the husband and father, and she also replaced the father by giving a wife to her son. . Thus we read, “And his mother [Ilagar] took him [Ishmael] a wife from the land of Egypt” (Gen. xxi. 21.)
Now Sarai Abram’s wife bare him no children: and she had an handmaid, an Egyptian, whose name was Hagar.
And Sarai Abram’s wife took Hagar her maid the Egyptian, after Abram had dwelt ten years in the land of Canaan, and gave her to her husband Abram to be his wife.
And Abram and Nahor took them wives: the name of Abram’s wife was Sarai; and the name of Nahor’s wife, Milcah, the daughter of Haran, the father of Milcah, and the father of Iscah.
And the sons of Ram the firstborn of Jerahmeel were, Maaz, and Jamin, and Eker.
And the sons of Jonathan; Peleth, and Zaza. These were the sons of Jerahmeel.
The chief was Ahiezer, then Joash, the sons of Shemaah the Gibeathite; and Jeziel, and Pelet, the sons of Azmaveth; and Berachah, and Jehu the Antothite,
And the sons of Onam were, Shammai, and Jada. And the sons of Shammai; Nadab, and Abishur.
The sons of Shobal; Alian, and Manahath, and Ebal, Shephi, and Onam. And the sons of Zibeon; Aiah, and Anah.
And Ophir, and Havilah, and Jobab. All these were the sons of Joktan.
And Naarah bare him Ahuzam, and Hepher, and Temeni, and Haahashtari. These were the sons of Naarah.
And the sons of Seir; Lotan, and Shobal, and Zibeon, and Anah, and Dishon, and Ezer, and Dishan.
And the sons of Cush; Seba, and Havilah, and Sabta, and Raamah, and Sabtecha. And the sons of Raamah; Sheba, and Dedan.
And the name of the wife of Abishur was Abihail, and she bare him Ahban, and Molid.

And the name of the man was Elimelech, and the name of his wife Naomi, and the name of his two sons Mahlon and Chilion, Ephrathites of Beth-lehem-judah. And they came into the country of Moab, and continued there.
¶ And Rehoboam took him Mahalath the daughter of Jerimoth the son of David to wife, and Abihail the daughter of Eliab the son of Jesse;
And forty and one years reigned he in Jerusalem. And his mother’s name was Maachah, the daughter of Abishalom.
And the sons of Nadab; Seled, and Appaim: but Seled died without children.
And the sons of Onam were, Shammai, and Jada. And the sons of Shammai; Nadab, and Abishur.
And Nadab and Abihu died, when they offered strange fire before the Lord.
And his firstborn son Abdon, and Zur, and Kish, and Baal, and Nadab,

And Nadab and Abihu died before the Lord, when they offered strange fire before the Lord, in the wilderness of Sinai, and they had no children: and Eleazar and Ithamar ministered in the priest’s office in the sight of Aaron their father.
And his firstborn son Abdon, then Zur, and Kish, and Baal, and Ner, and Nadab,
And the sons of Appaim; Ishi. And the sons of Ishi; Sheshan. And the children of Sheshan; Ahlai.
And Adaiah, and Beraiah, and Shimrath, the sons of Shimhi;
Of the sons also of Bebai; Jehohanan, Hananiah, Zabbai, and Athlai.
And the sons of Shimon were, Amnon, and Rinnah, Ben-hanan, and Tilon. And the sons of Ishi were, Zoheth, and Ben-zoheth.
And the sons of Hananiah; Pelatiah, and Jesaiah: the sons of Rephaiah, the sons of Arnan, the sons of Obadiah, the sons of Shechaniah.
And the sons of Jada the brother of Shammai; Jether, and Jonathan: and Jether died without children.
And the sons of Jether; Jephunneh, and Pispah, and Ara.
And the sons of Nadab; Seled, and Appaim: but Seled died without children.
And the sons of Japhlet; Pasach, and Bimhal, and Ashvath. These are the children of Japhlet.
And the sons of Jonathan; Peleth, and Zaza. These were the sons of Jerahmeel.
And the sons of Eliphaz were Teman, Omar, Zepho, and Gatam, and Kenaz.
And Joelah, and Zebadiah, the sons of Jeroham of Gedor.
¶ Now Sheshan had no sons, but daughters. And Sheshan had a servant, an Egyptian, whose name was Jarha.
¶ And Zelophehad the son of Hepher had no sons, but daughters: and the names of the daughters of Zelophehad were Mahlah, and Noah, Hoglah, Milcah, and Tirzah.
¶ Now the sons of Keturah, Abraham’s concubine: she bare Zimran, and Jokshan, and Medan, and Midian, and Ishbak, and Shuah. And the sons of Jokshan; Sheba, and Dedan.
And Sheshan gave his daughter to Jarha his servant to wife; and she bare him Attai.
¶ Now Sheshan had no sons, but daughters. And Sheshan had a servant, an Egyptian, whose name was Jarha.
And after her he took Maachah the daughter of Absalom; which bare him Abijah, and Attai, and Ziza, and Shelomith.
And she bare him Zimran, and Jokshan, and Medan, and Midian, and Ishbak, and Shuah.
And Ish-bosheth sent, and took her from her husband, even from Phaltiel the son of Laish.
¶ And afterward Hezron went in to the daughter of Machir the father of Gilead, whom he married when he was threescore years old; and she bare him Segub.
And Attai begat Nathan, and Nathan begat Zabad,
And Shelemiah, and Nathan, and Adaiah,
And Uzzi begat Zerahiah, and Zerahiah begat Meraioth,
And Eliud begat Eleazar; and Eleazar begat Matthan; and Matthan begat Jacob;
And Zabad begat Ephlal, and Ephlal begat Obed,
And Ahitub begat Zadok, and Zadok begat Shallum,
And Boaz begat Obed, and Obed begat Jesse,
And Obed begat Jehu, and Jehu begat Azariah,
And Ahimaaz begat Azariah, and Azariah begat Johanan,
And Ahaz begat Jehoadah; and Jehoadah begat Alemeth, and Azmaveth, and Zimri; and Zimri begat Moza,
And Azariah begat Seraiah, and Seraiah begat Jehozadak,
And Azariah begat Helez, and Helez begat Eleasah,
And Ezekias begat Manasses; and Manasses begat Amon; and Amon begat Josias;
And Ozias begat Joatham; and Joatham begat Achaz; and Achaz begat Ezekias;
And Azariah begat Amariah, and Amariah begat Ahitub,
And Eleasah begat Sisamai, and Sisamai begat Shallum,
And Asa begat Josaphat; and Josaphat begat Joram; and Joram begat Ozias;
And Shallum begat Jekamiah, and Jekamiah begat Elishama.
¶ Now the sons of Caleb the brother of Jerahmeel were, Mesha his firstborn, which was the father of Ziph; and the sons of Mareshah the father of Hebron.
Of the tribe of Judah, Caleb the son of Jephunneh.
¶ And unto Caleb the son of Jephunneh he gave a part among the children of Judah, according to the commandment of the Lord to Joshua, even the city of Arba the father of Anak, which city is Hebron.
¶ And Caleb the son of Hezron begat children of Azubah his wife, and of Jerioth: her sons are these; Jesher, and Shobab, and Ardon.
Hebron therefore became the inheritance of Caleb the son of Jephunneh the Kenezite unto this day, because that he wholly followed the Lord God of Israel.
And the sons of Hebron; Korah, and Tappuah, and Rekem, and Shema.
And the sons of Kohath; Amram, Izhar, and Hebron, and Uzziel.
And the sons of Kohath were, Amram, and Izhar, and Hebron, and Uzziel.
And of the sons of Harim; Maaseiah, and Elijah, and Shemaiah, and Jehiel, and Uzziah.
And the sons of Shechaniah; Shemaiah: and the sons of Shemaiah; Hattush, and Igeal, and Bariah, and Neariah, and Shaphat, six.
And Shema begat Raham, the father of Jorkoam: and Rekem begat Shammai.
And Jokshan begat Sheba, and Dedan. And the sons of Dedan were Asshurim, and Letushim, and Leummim.
And Joktan begat Almodad, and Sheleph, and Hazarmaveth, and Jerah,
And the son of Shammai was Maon: and Maon was the father of Beth-zur.
And these were their names: of the tribe of Reuben, Shammua the son of Zaccur.

Salma the father of Beth-lehem, Hareph the father of Beth-gader.
And the prince of the tribe of the children of Zebulun, Elizaphan the son of Parnach.
And Ephah, Caleb’s concubine, bare Haran, and Moza, and Gazez: and Haran begat Gazez.
Maachah, Caleb’s concubine, bare Sheber, and Tirhanah.
And the children of Aram; Uz, and Hul, and Gether, and Mash.
And the sons of Cush; Seba, and Havilah, and Sabtah, and Raamah, and Sabtecha: and the sons of Raamah; Sheba, and Dedan.
And Ner begat Kish; and Kish begat Saul; and Saul begat Jonathan, and Malchi-shua, and Abinadab, and Esh-baal.
And the sons of Jahdai; Regem, and Jotham, and Geshan, and Pelet, and Ephah, and Shaaph.
And the sons of Shamer; Ahi, and Rohgah, Jehubbah, and Aram.
And of the sons of Pahath-moab; Adna, and Chelal, Benaiah, Maaseiah, Mattaniah, Bezaleel, and Binnui, and Manasseh.
Maachah, Caleb’s concubine, bare Sheber, and Tirhanah.
And Ephah, Caleb’s concubine, bare Haran, and Moza, and Gazez: and Haran begat Gazez.
She bare also Shaaph the father of Madmannah, Sheva the father of Machbenah, and the father of Gibea: and the daughter of Caleb was Achsah.
And the prince of the tribe of the children of Asher, Ahihud the son of Shelomi.
¶ And the sons of Asher; Jimnah, and Ishuah, and Isui, and Beriah, and Serah their sister: and the sons of Beriah; Heber, and Malchiel.
She bare also Shaaph the father of Madmannah, Sheva the father of Machbenah, and the father of Gibea: and the daughter of Caleb was Achsah.
And Maachah the wife of Machir bare a son, and she called his name Peresh; and the name of his brother was Sheresh; and his sons were Ulam and Rakem.
And she yet again conceived, and bare a son; and called his name Shelah: and he was at Chezib, when she bare him.
And his concubine, whose name was Reumah, she bare also Tebah, and Gaham, and Thahash, and Maachah.
¶ These were the sons of Caleb the son of Hur, the firstborn of Ephratah; Shobal the father of Kirjath-jearim,
And Shobal the father of Kirjath-jearim had sons; Haroeh, and half of the Manahethites.
And the names of the men are these: Of the tribe of Judah, Caleb the son of Jephunneh.
Salma the father of Beth-lehem, Hareph the father of Beth-gader.
And Penuel the father of Gedor, and Ezer the father of Hushah. These are the sons of Hur, the firstborn of Ephratah, the father of Beth-lehem.
And upon Kiriathaim, and upon Beth-gamul, and upon Beth-meon,
And the son of Shammai was Maon: and Maon was the father of Beth-zur.
¶ Also the valiant men of the armies were, Asahel the brother of Joab, Elhanan the son of Dodo of Beth-lehem,
And Kish was the father of Saul; and Ner the father of Abner was the son of Abiel.
And Shobal the father of Kirjath-jearim had sons; Haroeh, and half of the Manahethites.
And the sons of Shimei were, Jahath, Zina, and Jeush, and Beriah. These four were the sons of Shimei.
And the children of Shobal were these; Alvan, and Manahath, and Ebal, Shepho, and Onam.
And Reaiah the son of Shobal begat Jahath; and Jahath begat Ahumai, and Lahad. These are the families of the Zorathites.
¶ These were the sons of Caleb the son of Hur, the firstborn of Ephratah; Shobal the father of Kirjath-jearim,
And the families of Kirjath-jearim; the Ithrites, and the Puhites, and the Shumathites, and the Mishraites; of them came the Zareathites, and the Eshtaulites.
And the families of the scribes which dwelt at Jabez; the Tirathites, the Shimeathites, and Suchathites. These are the Kenites that came of Hemath, the father of the house of Rechab.
And the coast of their inheritance was Zorah, and Eshtaol, and Ir-shemesh,
And the residue of the families of the sons of Kohath had cities of their coasts out of the tribe of Ephraim.
¶ And of Kohath was the family of the Amramites, and the family of the Izeharites, and the family of the Hebronites, and the family of the Uzzielites: these are the families of the Kohathites.
Of Zerah, the family of the Zarhites: of Shaul, the family of the Shaulites.
The sons of Salma; Beth-lehem, and the Netophathites, Ataroth, the house of Joab, and half of the Manahethites, the Zorites.
¶ These are the sons of Seir the Horite, who inhabited the land; Lotan, and Shobal, and Zibeon, and Anah,
Of Syria, and of Moab, and of the children of Ammon, and of the Philistines, and of Amalek, and of the spoil of Hadadezer, son of Rehob, king of Zobah.
And Azariah the son of Hilkiah, the son of Meshullam, the son of Zadok, the son of Meraioth, the son of Ahitub, the ruler of the house of God;
And the families of the scribes which dwelt at Jabez; the Tirathites, the Shimeathites, and Suchathites. These are the Kenites that came of Hemath, the father of the house of Rechab.
And the families of Kirjath-jearim; the Ithrites, and the Puhites, and the Shumathites, and the Mishraites; of them came the Zareathites, and the Eshtaulites.
And of the sons of Heman; Jehiel, and Shimei: and of the sons of Jeduthun; Shemaiah, and Uzziel.
These are now the chief of their fathers, and this is the genealogy of them that went up with me from Babylon, in the reign of Artaxerxes the king.

And these were the heads of the house of their fathers, even Epher, and Ishi, and Eliel, and Azriel, and Jeremiah, and Hodaviah, and Jahdiel, mighty men of valour, famous men, and heads of the house of their fathers.
